owned_files.notes: 3 .rs files: mod.rs (167 LOC, fully wired), collision.rs (12 LOC, scaffold), fluid.rs (14 LOC, explicit stub). mod.rs wraps complete rapier3d pipeline (RigidBodySet, ColliderSet, IslandManager, BroadPhase, NarrowPhase, joint sets, CCDSolver, PhysicsPipeline, QueryPipeline). Helpers: step, add_rigid_body, add_collider, cast_ray, get/set position/rotation/velocity, apply_impulse, remove.

gaps: Fluid simulation is a 14-line stub — no particle or grid solver
Collision events module is a 12-line scaffold — no event queue or callback registry
No joint helpers exposed at PhysicsWorld level (raw rapier3d sets accessible but no convenience API)
No continuous collision detection (CCD) wiring for fast-moving bodies
todos_found: src/physics/collision.rs:5 — TODO: event queue, callback registry
src/physics/fluid.rs:7 — TODO: particle-based or grid-based fluid sim
summary: Core rapier3d wrapper is solid and complete. Fluid sim, collision events, and soft-body remain stubs/missing — registry's active completion check confirms work is needed.
